name: education_procurement_shortcut_introduces_harbor_jus_mer
premise: A Education district emergency desk is in a fast-moving incident involving education procurement shortcut introduces harbor jus mer. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases student safety, continuity, and fairness. Stakeholders are already framing this as justice vs mercy under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Mei Petrov
agents.identity: I am Mei Petrov, accountable for a defensible call in Education when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays mercy for justice.

agents.name: Camila Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Camila Vasquez, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Education.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so mercy isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of justice.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect mercy.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to mercy to secure justice under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Mei Petrov must decide under justice vs mercy. What does Mei Petrov do?
